CIML Meeting2019October 22, 2019

🇸🇰 Bratislava, Slovakia

54th CIML Meeting — Resolutions (EN)

Meeting DOI10.63493/meetings/ciml54
Meeting URNurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-54

Agenda

ItemTitleOutcome
aBratislava, SlovakiaDiscussed
b22–25 October 2019Discussed
cOpening speeches – Roll call – Approval of the agendaAdopted
1Approval of the minutes of the 53rd CIML MeetingAdopted
2General report by the CIML PresidentDiscussed
3Presentation by the candidates for CIML Second Vice-PresidentDiscussed
4BIML matters and activitiesDiscussed
4.1Report by the BIML DirectorDiscussed
4.2Report on training activitiesDiscussed
5Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscussed
6Financial mattersDiscussed
6.1Approval of the 2018 accountsAdopted
6.2Forecast budget realization for 2019Discussed
6.3Arrears of Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscussed
7Liaisons and Regional Legal Metrology Organizations (RLMOs)Discussed
7.1Report by the BIML on activities with organizations in liaisonDiscussed
7.2Report by the RLMO Round Table ChairpersonDiscussed
7.3Update by the Bureau International des Poids et Mesures (BIPM)Discussed
7.4Update on the work of the Consultative Committee for Units (CCU)Discussed
7.5Updates by other organizations in liaisonDiscussed
8Countries and Economies with Emerging Metrology Systems (CEEMS)Discussed
8.1Report by the CEEMS Advisory Group ChairpersonDiscussed
8.2Report by the BIML on activities in connection with CEEMS mattersDiscussed
9OIML Certification System (OIML-CS)Discussed
9.1Report by the OIML-CS Management Committee ChairpersonDiscussed
10OIML publications and projectsDiscussed
11Election of the CIML Second Vice-PresidentDiscussed
12Presentation of OIML AwardsDiscussed
13Preparation of the 16th International Conference (2020)Discussed
14Future meetingsDiscussed
15Other mattersDiscussed
16Review of meeting resolutionsDiscussed

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
